name: rpn32-monorepo
description: A terminal RPN calculator inspired by the HP 32SII

scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-core run clean && pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-cli run clean
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-core run build && pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-cli run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-core run build && pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-cli run dev
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:unit
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:types && pnpm run test:unit
